title: tilia tuan subsp. tristis
intro: Tilia tuan subsp. tristis, also known as the Chinese linden or small-leaved linden, is a subspecies of the Tilia tuan plant, native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tilia tuan subsp. tristis include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
